title: erlangea laxa
intro: Erlangea laxa, also known as African Eclipta, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is widely used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Erlangea laxa include promoting hair growth, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting liver and kidney function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
